message:
test(harness): memory_ops harness-matrix + in-process oracle (bd-rw7a)

Adds two execution paths to memory_ops_conformance_test (previously had
only schema/coverage validation):

  memory_ops_fixture_cases_match_execute_fixture_case
    In-process oracle through `frankenlibc_fixture_exec`.
  memory_ops_fixture_executes_with_host_parity_via_harness_matrix
    Isolated subprocess through `harness conformance-matrix-case`.

Covers all 11 fixture cases across memcpy / memmove / memset / memcmp /
memchr in both strict and hardened modes.

Verification (rch + CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_frankenlibc_cc):
  cargo test  -p frankenlibc-harness --test memory_ops_conformance_test
                                                     15 passed
  cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-harness --all-targets -- -D warnings  clean
  cargo fmt --check -p frankenlibc-harness          clean
  ubs <touched>                                       exit 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
